description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile sports car with a striking metallic gold exterior and sharply contoured body panels. The front features angular headlights and a pointed nose, giving it an aggressive, aerodynamic appearance. The side profile reveals two doors, large alloy wheels, and sculpted side skirts, emphasizing its performance-oriented design. The rear is equipped with a prominent diffuser, dual exhausts, and a subtle integrated spoiler, while the rear window is flanked by black air vents. The windows are tinted black, and the car sits close to the ground, enhancing its sporty stance. The overall design is reminiscent of high-end Italian supercars, combining luxury with speed.
description: A gold, low-slung sports car with sharp lines, black-tinted windows, and large alloy wheels, featuring an aggressive front and a detailed rear diffuser.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, angular headlights, and wide, low stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door coupe design, large wheels, and sculpted side panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dual exhausts, rear diffuser, integrated spoiler, and black air vents.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the aerodynamic profile and wheel design.
